requirements: Every migrated package tsconfig extends ../../tsconfig.base.json or the correct relative root base path.
Every migrated package sets a package-owned rootDir and outDir: dist.
Every migrated package emits declarations and declaration maps for exported TypeScript.
Every migrated package keeps noEmitOnError effective for build outputs.
No production package tsconfig may introduce allowJs; checkJs is not a migration substitute.
NodeNext module and moduleResolution settings are inherited or preserved; runtime ESM imports must be proven by actual Node import/spawn witnesses.
After a package migration, package exports import targets point to generated dist/**/*.js files.
After a package migration, package exports types targets and package types fields point to generated dist/**/*.d.ts files.
After CLI migration, package bin entries point to generated dist/** executable JavaScript with shebang behavior proven by spawn witness.
Package exports and bins must not point to packages/**/src/**/*.js or packages/**/src/**/*.mjs as final state.
Existing source-JS exports and bins are audited migration debt until their owning TS lane replaces them with dist/declaration outputs.
Generated dist/**/*.js is allowed only as build output from matching TypeScript source and matching declaration output.
Generated dist output must not be hand-written or used to hide production source-JS debt.
Build/export witnesses in TS-ROOT write emitted dist, declarations, cache, and temporary package-resolution fixtures only under .vibe/work/TS-ROOT-build-export-contract/**.
Product packages/**/dist/** is read-only for TS-ROOT and may be inventoried only as baseline evidence.

workspaceSurfaceWitness.classification: evidence-only workspace surface witness referenced by root workspace:surface script; not package export/bin/runtime source

currentSourceJsExportsAndBins.classification: TS-09V verification package source-JS export debt; current value ./src/index.js remains read-only in TS-ROOT
audited package export/bin debt owned by later package TS migration lanes, not allowed final state

requirements: Structured contract witnesses parse JSON from actual package.json, turbo.json, tsconfig.base.json, build-export-contract.schema.json, and build-export-contract.json; regex/prose checks are insufficient.
Root build/export witnesses exercise the actual root script and Turbo command path in an owned transient workspace.
Package export consumption witnesses import a built package through package exports after transient build and prove owned transient dist/declaration outputs were used.
Negative witnesses reject weakened strict flags, allowJs, source-JS export/bin final state, and generated dist without TypeScript/declaration/build evidence.

Regression witnesses prove workspace:surface remains present and evidence-only, the audited 43 production JS/MJS files are not migrated or silently allowlisted by TS-ROOT, TS-09V remains deferred, and no lockfile/package-manager/package source/product dist path changed.
